Hello,
I am evaluating your platform for AI outbound calling.
Please confirm:
1) What is the maximum number of concurrent / simultaneous outbound calls supported per plan?
2) Can this be increased to 100 or more? If yes, which plan tier supports that?
3) What are the pricing details for higher concurrency?
Thank you!

Hello! I'm glad you're considering our platform for AI outbound calling. Let me provide you with some details:

1) The maximum number of concurrent outbound calls supported per plan can vary based on the specific plan you choose. Typically, our basic plans support a lower number of concurrent calls, while our higher-tier plans allow for more.

2) Yes, it is possible to increase the number of concurrent calls to 100 or more. This is generally available in our premium or enterprise plan tiers, which are designed for businesses with higher calling needs.

3) As for pricing details for higher concurrency, it also depends on the specific plan you select. Higher-tier plans usually come with a different pricing structure that reflects the increased capabilities. I recommend checking our pricing page or contacting our sales team for the most accurate and up-to-date information.

If you have any more questions or need further clarification, feel free to ask!
